summary: Frontend-only visual/animation test of redesigned DataPipelineVisualization in About section. All 10 requested features verified. Dashed lines correctly render through icon centers with forked topology at Load. Animated packets loop continuously along main line and both forks. Mobile responsive at 390px shows all 5 icons/labels visible.

issues: Icons/labels are visibly compressed near the fork area; AI/ML sits directly above Analyze at 85% and looks tight, though all labels remain readable. Consider reducing icon size or increasing card padding at <sm breakpoints for better spacing.

verified_features.5_icons_present: PASS - Extract, Transform, Load, AI/ML, Analyze all visible
verified_features.dashed_main_line: PASS - path M 40 55 L 200 55 with strokeDasharray 8 5
verified_features.fork_structure: PASS - two forks from Load(200,55): upper to (340,30) AI/ML, lower to (340,80) Analyze
verified_features.line_through_icon_centers: PASS - icons top:35px + h-10/2 = y=55 aligns to line; AI/ML top:10 + 20 = y=30; Analyze top:60 + 20 = y=80
verified_features.animated_packets_main: PASS - 3 packets on main line, positions changed between frames
verified_features.animated_packets_forks: PASS - 2 packets on upper fork, 2 on lower fork, all moved
verified_features.continuous_loop: PASS - repeat: Infinity in Framer Motion transitions

critical_code_review_comments: Fork paths use L 280 55 L 340 30 / 80 which creates a sharp elbow at (280,55); this is intentional per design but a curved path (Q or C) could look smoother.
AI/ML label 'AI/ML' contains a slash - accessible but visually could match uppercase style of others (currently rendered fine).
No accessibility labels (aria) on decorative SVG - minor, since it is illustrative.
context_for_next_testing_agent: DataPipelineVisualization at /app/frontend/src/components/About.jsx uses viewBox 400x140. Main line y=55 Extract(40)->Transform(120)->Load(200). Two forks from Load: upper via (280,55) to (340,30)=AI/ML, lower via (280,55) to (340,80)=Analyze. 7 total motion.circle packets (3+2+2), all animating with repeat:Infinity. All labels visible on desktop and 390px mobile.
